title: Device, WolfTpmLinuxDev, WolfTpmSwtpm missing Debug impl
description: wolftpm::Device, wolftpm_tss::WolfTpmLinuxDev, and WolfTpmSwtpm have no Debug impl. Any caller that puts these in a struct that derives Debug, or wants to use {:?} in error logging, is blocked. WolfTpmDev (private) correctly implements manual Debug showing only the pointer address; the public wrapper types should delegate to it or implement the same pattern. Missing Debug on public types is a friction point in the Rust ecosystem — #[derive(Debug)] is the standard expectation for any library type.
